rungs.description: merge-court no-stub gate: the REAL scanForStubs detects a genuine stub (throw new Error not implemented) and passes a genuine implementation clean (no false positive)
completion-integrity: the REAL 14-point runCIPCheck classifies a no-evidence dim as missing and BLOCKS FRONTIER_REACHED (cannot self-pass nothing)
protected-lines: capability-proven file:line ranges are protected; touching one is a real violation; unprotect releases it (full govern->detect->release lifecycle)
